name: @talos/trending
description: Monorepo for trending - time series data visualization packages

scripts.build: npm -w packages/core run build && npm -w packages/react run build && npm -w packages/vue run build && npm -w packages/svelte run build && npm -w packages/solid run build
scripts.dev: npm -w packages/core run dev & npm -w packages/react run dev & npm -w packages/vue run dev & npm -w packages/svelte run dev & npm -w packages/solid run dev
scripts.typecheck: npm -w packages/core run typecheck && npm -w packages/react run typecheck && npm -w packages/solid run typecheck
